falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 30-day high by 5% with volume exceeding 200% of the 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout with explosive volume would invalidate the HOLD signal, indicating a potential trend reversal or strong bullish momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 50+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, contradicting the current HOLD and suggesting a potential market top

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes below the 200-day moving average for three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed breakdown below key long-term support would invalidate the HOLD signal, indicating a potential bearish trend continuation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
